name: claude-code
description: Sync Claude Code sessions to Jieli threads and attach Jieli thread trailers to Claude-created commits.

api_key.title: Jieli API key
api_key.description: API key used to upload and read your Jieli threads.

base_url.title: Jieli base URL
base_url.description: Base URL for your Jieli instance. Defaults to https://jieli.app; set this only for self-hosted instances.
